view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step confirms that the requirement for a 'Simple online booking page' is met. Evidence from the linked use case indicates that clients can visit a booking page, select available slots, and complete the booking process, which aligns with the requirement. Specifically, the successful booking entries (e.g., 'customer-book-primary' and 'customer-two-concurrent') demonstrate that the booking functionality is operational and meets the specified needs.
